title: Trump Says U.S. Pausing Efforts to Guide Ships Through Strait Blocked by Iran
summary_full: President Trump said a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would “remain in full force.” The shift came after the defense secretary said U.S. efforts to free trapped vessels would continue.
summary_public: President Trump said a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would “remain in full force.” The shift came after the defense secretary said U.S. efforts to free trapped vessels would continue.

IR.label: neutral
